description: 6 critical bug fixes for the LinkedIn automation MCP server

features.name: Expose native click endpoint POST /api/linkedin/debug/click and GET /api/linkedin/debug/screenshot
Fix sendMessageToProfile to keep interop=msgOverlay and use native clickAtViewportPosition on profile page
Remove broken section scoping from compose DOM search, use document-scoped multi-selector
Add openNewCompose() function and POST /api/linkedin/messages/new-compose endpoint for first-contact DMs
Add waitForCondition() to SafariDriver and replace all wait(N) fixed delays
Add force: true flag to all send/connect endpoints to bypass active-hours check
Add navigateViaGoogle() helper and POST /api/linkedin/navigate/via-google endpoint
